---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Second Brain++
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem would this solve?**
A clear description of the gap or friction you're hitting.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see happen. If it touches the Personal LLM core's responsibilities
(memory, retrieval, routing) rather than vault/link/graph workflows, note that too -
see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) ground rule 3.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else relevant (mockups, related issues, links).
